subject: [PATCH v6 10/15] mm/userfaultfd: add RWP fault delivery and expose UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP

2026-05-29.patch_summary: This patch adds support for read-write protection (RWP) in the userfaultfd interface, allowing userspace to track and manage RWP-protected pages. It introduces a new fault delivery mechanism that distinguishes between RWP faults and other types of faults. The patch also exposes UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and related API calls to userspace. The implementation works with anonymous, shmem, and hugetlb memory types. The goal is to provide a more fine-grained control over page access permissions in the presence of userfaultfd.
